mm.lastwords.title: %s's lastwords:
mm.lastwords.2.6: "It's great that you escaped from the Murderer's eyes."
mm.lastwords.6.1: "I don't die very often, but I die with dignity every time."
mm.lastwords.6.2: "I would rather die in my place than live in mediocrity."
mm.lastwords.6.3: "Everybody wants to go to heaven, but nobody wants to go to hell."
mm.lastwords.6.5: "Death is not a loss of life, but a step out of time."
mm.lastwords.7.1: "Hint: One death is a tragedy, but 15 deaths are a victory for the Murderer."
mm.lastwords.7.2: "Hint: Use the compass to find the whereabouts of the Detective Bow."
mm.lastwords.7.3: "Hint: If you see a man with a sword, stay calm and stay away from him."
mm.lastwords.7.4: "Hint: Collect 10 gold to get an arrow."
mm.lastwords.7.5: "Hint: Getting a Detective Bow doesn't necessarily mean victory."
mm.lastwords.8.1: "I don't want to play any more."
mm.lastwords.8.2: "I'm not dead. I just quit the game in anger."
mm.lastwords.8.3: "It's sad that so many people have died."
mm.lastwords.8.4: "Somebody can only get coal this year."
mm.lastwords.9.1: "No one knows Murder Mystery better than I do."
mm.lastwords.9.3: "It's a good mentality to fight for every penny."
mm.lastwords.9.4: "For me, the interesting thing is the process, not the result."
mm.lastwords.9.5: "I'll nod and it will be done."
mm.lastwords.14.1: "It is indeed a luxury to keep human beings sane forever."
mm.lastwords.14.2: "The biggest obstacle to survival is never weakness, but arrogance."
mm.lastwords.14.3: "There is more than one definition of life, and the body restricts human vision."
mm.lastwords.14.4: "Mankind reveres history, but despises the future."

mm.text_settings.play.mode_features.prop: Applicable modes: Prop/Prop Double Up. Allow/Disallow the spawning of certain props.
Activate the prop to die immediately.
Immediately receive a small amount of gold ingots.
Randomly increase or decrease the time.
Randomly swap positions with a surviving player.
All other players except yourself are frozen for 5 seconds.
Convert gold ingots in your inventory into an equal number of arrows.
Teleport to the waiting teleport point for 30 seconds.
Gain Speed III for 15 seconds. If you kill an enemy player within 15 seconds, gain an additional 10 seconds of Speed III; otherwise, die.
Applicable modes: Prop/Prop Double Up. The generate rate of prop within the game arena.
mm.text_settings.play.mode_features.rand: Applicable modes: Classic/Double Up/Prop/Infection v2/Prop Double Up/Boss. Whether the probability of each player being assigned a special role is uniform.
